en: And the word of the LORD of hosts came, saying,
zh: 萬軍之耶和華的話臨到我說：

en: "Thus says the LORD of hosts: I am jealous for Zion with great jealousy, and I am jealous for her with great wrath.
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘我十分熱愛錫安；我為錫安大發烈怒。’

en: Thus says the LORD: I have returned to Zion and will dwell in the midst of Jerusalem, and Jerusalem shall be called the faithful city, and the mountain of the LORD of hosts, the holy mountain.
zh: 耶和華這樣說：‘我要返回錫安，住在耶路撒冷裡面；耶路撒冷必稱為“信實之城”，萬軍之耶和華的山必稱為“聖山”。’

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts: Old men and old women shall again sit in the streets of Jerusalem, each with staff in hand because of great age.
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘年老的男女必再坐在耶路撒冷的街上；他們因為年紀老邁，各人都手拿拐杖。

en: And the streets of the city shall be full of boys and girls playing in its streets.
zh: 城裡的街上必滿了男孩女孩，在街上嬉戲。’

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts: If it is marvelous in the sight of the remnant of this people in those days, should it also be marvelous in my sight, declares the LORD of hosts?
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘在那些日子，這事在這餘剩的子民眼中被視為不可能的奇蹟，在我眼中也視為不可能嗎？’這是萬軍之耶和華的宣告。

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts: behold, I will save my people from the east country and from the west country,
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘看哪！我必從日出之地和日落之地拯救我的子民。

en: and I will bring them to dwell in the midst of Jerusalem. And they shall be my people, and I will be their God, in faithfulness and in righteousness."
zh: 我要把他們領回來，讓他們住在耶路撒冷；他們要作我的子民，我也要憑著信實和公義作他們的 神。’

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts: "Let your hands be strong, you who in these days have been hearing these words from the mouth of the prophets who were present on the day that the foundation of the house of the LORD of hosts was laid, that the temple might be built.
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘在萬軍之耶和華的殿奠立了根基，預備建造的日子，你們這些在當時聽過眾先知親口宣告這些話的人，現在你們的手務要剛強。

en: For before those days there was no wage for man or any wage for beast, neither was there any safety from the foe for him who went out or came in, for I set every man against his neighbor.
zh: 因為在那些日子以前，人作工是沒有工價的，牲畜也是這樣，並且因有敵人的緣故，人出入就沒有平安，我也使眾人互相攻擊。

en: But now I will not deal with the remnant of this people as in the former days, declares the LORD of hosts.
zh: 但現在我待這些餘剩的子民必不像從前的日子那樣 。

en: For there shall be a sowing of peace. The vine shall give its fruit, and the ground shall give its produce, and the heavens shall give their dew. And I will cause the remnant of this people to possess all these things.
zh: 因為五穀必生長繁茂，葡萄樹必結果子，地土必出土產，天也必降下甘露，我要使這些餘剩的子民承受這一切。

en: And as you have been a byword of cursing among the nations, O house of Judah and house of Israel, so will I save you, and you shall be a blessing. Fear not, but let your hands be strong."
zh: 猶大家和以色列家啊！你們從前怎樣在萬國中成為可咒詛的，將來，我也要怎樣拯救你們，使你們成為祝福。你們不要懼怕，你們的手務要剛強。’

en: For thus says the LORD of hosts: "As I purposed to bring disaster to you when your fathers provoked me to wrath, and I did not relent, says the LORD of hosts,
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘你們的列祖惹我發怒的時候，我曾定意降禍在你們身上，並沒有改變心意 ；

en: so again have I purposed in these days to bring good to Jerusalem and to the house of Judah; fear not.
zh: 照樣，在這些日子裡，我定意恩待耶路撒冷和猶大家。你們不要懼怕。

en: These are the things that you shall do: Speak the truth to one another; render in your gates judgments that are true and make for peace;
zh: 你們應當行這些事：你們各人要與鄰舍說真話，在你們的城門口要憑著誠實施行帶來和平的審判。

en: do not devise evil in your hearts against one another, and love no false oath, for all these things I hate, declares the LORD."
zh: 你們各人不要心裡圖謀惡事，彼此陷害，也不可好起假誓，因為這些都是我所恨惡的。’這是耶和華的宣告。”

en: And the word of the LORD of hosts came to me, saying,
zh: 萬軍之耶和華的話臨到我，說：

en: "Thus says the LORD of hosts: The fast of the fourth month and the fast of the fifth and the fast of the seventh and the fast of the tenth shall be to the house of Judah seasons of joy and gladness and cheerful feasts. Therefore love truth and peace.
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘四月的禁食、五月的禁食、七月的禁食和十月的禁食都要變為猶大家歡喜快樂的日子和歡樂的節期。所以，你們要喜愛誠實與和平。’

en: "Thus says the LORD of hosts: Peoples shall yet come, even the inhabitants of many cities.
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘將來還有萬族的人和多個城市的居民要來。

en: The inhabitants of one city shall go to another, saying, 'Let us go at once to entreat the favor of the LORD and to seek the LORD of hosts; I myself am going.'
zh: 一城的居民到另一城去，對他們說：我們快去懇求耶和華施恩，求告萬軍之耶和華；我自己也去。

en: Many peoples and strong nations shall come to seek the LORD of hosts in Jerusalem and to entreat the favor of the LORD.
zh: 必有很多的民族和強大的國家前來，在耶路撒冷求告萬軍之耶和華，懇求他施恩。’

en: Thus says the LORD of hosts: In those days ten men from the nations of every tongue shall take hold of the robe of a Jew, saying, 'Let us go with you, for we have heard that God is with you.'"
zh: “萬軍之耶和華這樣說：‘在那些日子，必有十個說不同方言，來自列國的人，緊抓住一個猶大人的衣襟，說：讓我們與你們同去吧，因為我們聽見 神與你們同在。’”
